zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
短期价格运行在69.10均线下方，整体结构偏弱，反弹动能不足，市场仍处于回调后的震荡整理阶段。上方均线压制明显，需放量突破才能扭转趋势。

MACD指标持续位于零轴下方并维持负值，动能柱未见收敛，空头力量仍占主导。RSI缺失但结合价格结构偏弱判断超买不足。短线动量仍偏空。

下方关键支撑位在68.40附近，若跌破可能测试更低区间；上方阻力首先看69.10，其次70整数关口。区间震荡概率较高。谨慎交易

操作上建议以反弹做空为主，等待回抽至均线附近承压再介入，同时严格设置止损控制风险。避免追涨杀跌，保持纪律交易。关注成交量确认信号。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently showing a mild bearish-to-neutral structure, with price action holding just below the 20-period SMA at 69.103. The market has been compressing in a tight intraday range between 68.67 and 68.44, indicating low volatility but also a lack of bullish follow-through. Overall trend bias leans slightly downward as buyers fail to reclaim the short-term moving average. This positioning suggests the market is struggling to build momentum above recent equilibrium levels.

Momentum indicators reinforce this soft bearish tone. MACD is negative at -0.69384282, suggesting persistent downside pressure, while the absence of a clear signal line reading limits confirmation of reversal strength. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior near the session low implies subdued demand. The lack of upward impulsive moves indicates sellers remain in control, albeit without strong acceleration, pointing to consolidation within a weakening structure and limited directional conviction.

Immediate support is located around 68.40, with a break below potentially exposing the psychological 68.00 level and further downside toward prior consolidation zones. On the upside, initial resistance is aligned with the 20-SMA at 69.10, followed by a stronger barrier near 70.00, where previous rejection pressure has emerged. A sustained move above the SMA would be required to shift short-term sentiment back toward a neutral-to-bullish outlook.

Trading conditions favor cautious strategies due to compressed volatility and unclear directional conviction. Short-term traders may consider range-bound tactics between 68.00 support and 69.10 resistance, while breakout confirmation is preferable before trend-following positions. Risk management is essential, as false breakouts are more likely in low-volume conditions. A decisive close above 70.00 would improve bullish prospects, while failure to hold 68.00 could accelerate downside momentum.
